_comment: Copy this file to data/codes.private.json (gitignored), set a real salt, and add real guests. Run `npm run build:letters` afterwards to produce src/data/letters.encrypted.json.

body.ko: 민수 형 — 함께 걸어온 길, 오늘도 옆에 있어 줘서 고마워요.
body.en: Minsu — thanks for walking this road with me, and for being here today too.

body.ko: Alice — 우리 결혼식에 와 줘서 정말 고마워요.
body.en: Dear Alice — thank you for being part of our day.
body.de: Liebe Alice — danke, dass Du Teil unseres Tages bist.
